appraisal_events.evidence: « Le duc… fronça son sourcil jupitérien… Quand il n'aimait pas rendre un service, il ne voulait pas que sa femme s'en chargeât… »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents the duke as reluctant to be of service and concerned to prevent his wife from engaging in it, which makes him appear unaccommodating and calculating in social exchange.

status_effects.explanation: He is shown as not inclined to be of service and to let his wife do so, which diminishes him in terms of obligingness and immediate social esteem.
